713 GG0130E3_BTHE_SELF_END_CD GG0130E3_BTHE_SELF_END_CD GG0130E3 Bathe Self End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to bathe self, including washing, rinsing, and drying self (excludes washing of back and hair) (excludes transferring in/out of tub/shower) at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
